name: Rahul Sharma

key_projects.name: VidChain
key_projects.one_liner: Multimodal RAG framework for forensic video intelligence using local LLMs

key_projects.name: Jarvis
key_projects.one_liner: Privacy-first local AI assistant for job applications using Ollama + Mistral

about_me: I'm a final-year CS student with a deep interest in building privacy-first, edge-optimized AI systems. I've built production-grade LLM pipelines, multimodal RAG frameworks, and local inference tools — all designed to run on consumer hardware without cloud dependencies. I care about the intersection of AI reliability, system design, and user privacy.
